headline: Viatris Gears Up to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Cards?
summary: VTRS gears up to report Q1 results as import alerts, regional pressures and growth in key brands shape expectations ahead of May 7 release.

raw.headline: Viatris Gears Up to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Cards?

headline: Viatris Announces Quarterly Dividend
summary: Viatris Inc. (Nasdaq: VTRS) today announced that on May 4, 2026, its Board of Directors declared a quarterly dividend of $0.12 per share for each issued and outstanding share of the Company's common stock. The dividend is payable on June 17, 2026, to shareholders of record as of the close of business on May 22, 2026.

headline: Edwards names Theodora Mistras as CFO
summary: Mistras, who joins the heart valve company after two years as CFO at pharmaceutical firm Viatris, also brings investment banking experience.
